findings.reasoning: React effect and local derived assignments detected without useMemo/useCallback guards.
findings.fix: Memoize derived computations with useMemo/useCallback when dependencies are stable.
findings.recommendation: Memoize derived computations with useMemo/useCallback when dependencies are stable.

findings.reasoning: Response writing detected but no helmet/security header middleware reference found.
findings.impact: Lack of hardening headers can increase browser-side attack surface.
findings.fix: Enable helmet or equivalent security header middleware for HTTP responses.
findings.recommendation: Enable helmet or equivalent security header middleware for HTTP responses.
